languages.text: "Странно слышать такое от друга госпожи Ювенны. Вам стоит поучиться у нее дальновидности".

traits.locale_text: "Странно слышать такое от друга госпожи Ювенны. Вам стоит поучиться у нее дальновидности".

languages.text: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."
languages.original_text: "Странно слышать такое от друга госпожи Ювенны. Вам стоит поучиться у нее дальновидности".

traits.locale_text: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."
"A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."
"A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."

languages.text: “作为尤文娜女士的朋友，你居然会说出这种话。你该多学学她的远见才是。”
languages.original_text: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."

traits.locale_text: “作为尤文娜女士的朋友，你居然会说出这种话。你该多学学她的远见才是。”

languages.text: « Une étrange remarque de la part d'{mf|un ami|une amie} de dame Juvenna. Vous devriez vous inspirer de sa clairvoyance. »
languages.original_text: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."

traits.locale_text: « Une étrange remarque de la part d'{mf|un ami|une amie} de dame Juvenna. Vous devriez vous inspirer de sa clairvoyance. »

languages.text: "Leydi Juvenna'nın dostundan garip bir açıklama. Onun öngörüsünden ders almak farz olmuş."
languages.original_text: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."

traits.locale_text: "Leydi Juvenna'nın dostundan garip bir açıklama. Onun öngörüsünden ders almak farz olmuş."

languages.text: «Un comentario extraño, viniendo de un{mf||a} amig{mf|o|a} de Juvenna. Haría bien en imitar su capacidad de previsión».
languages.original_text: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."

traits.locale_text: «Un comentario extraño, viniendo de un{mf||a} amig{mf|o|a} de Juvenna. Haría bien en imitar su capacidad de previsión».

languages.text: "Eine seltsame Anmerkung für {mf|einen Freund|eine Freundin} von Lady Juvenna. Ihr solltet Euch ein Beispiel an ihrem Weitblick nehmen."
languages.original_text: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."

traits.locale_text: "Eine seltsame Anmerkung für {mf|einen Freund|eine Freundin} von Lady Juvenna. Ihr solltet Euch ein Beispiel an ihrem Weitblick nehmen."

languages.text: ジュベナ夫人の友人から聞いた奇妙な話。彼女の先見の明を学べばいい。
languages.original_text: "A strange remark from a friend of Lady Juvenna. You ought to learn from her foresight."

traits.locale_text: ジュベナ夫人の友人から聞いた奇妙な話。彼女の先見の明を学べばいい。
